text.Sorola.fi - Hyödylliset IT-työkalut ja t: Sorola.fi - Useful IT tools and technical guides
text.Sorola tarjoaa käyttöösi monipuoliset ja: Sorola offers versatile and secure IT tools to make everyday life easier. On our site you'll find, among other things, a fast link shortener, an easy temporary file sharing service, and clear technical guides for different software and tools.
text.Kehitämme jatkuvasti uusia ratkaisuja, j: We keep building new solutions that make your digital everyday life smoother. You can also explore Markus Sorola's CV and portfolio if you're looking for a capable contributor for IT projects.
text.Kokoelma perheen omia sivuja, teknisiä o: A collection of family pages, technical guides, and useful information.
text.Itse koodatut, nopeat ja ilman mainoksia: Self-built, fast, ad-free helpers for everyday digital life.

attributes.Sorola.fi tarjoaa näppärät ja turvallise: Sorola.fi offers handy and secure everyday tools: a fast link shortener, temporary file sharing, and clear IT guides and tutorials.

text.Sorolan linkinlyhentimellä voit muuttaa: With Sorola's link shortener you can turn long URLs into shorter links that are easier to share.
text.Liitä haluamasi verkkosivun osoite kentt: Paste the web page address you want into the field.
text.Palvelu luo automaattisesti lyhyen osoit: The service will automatically create a short address.
text.Voit jakaa lyhyen linkin esimerkiksi:: You can share the short link, for example:
text.Linkinlyhennin ei muuta alkuperäisen siv: The link shortener does not change the content of the original page. The short link only redirects to the original address.

text.Bitwarden on virallinen salasananhallint: Bitwarden is an official password management service that lets you store login details, passwords, notes, payment cards, and other important information in an encrypted vault. The same vault works in your browser, on your computer, and on your phone.
text.Valitse ennen tilin luomista palvelinalu: Before creating the account, choose either of these server regions:
text.EU- ja USA-palvelimet ovat erillisiä. Ti: The EU and US servers are separate. Your account only works on the server where it was created, so use the same server selection in all Bitwarden apps.
text.Syötä sähköpostiosoite, nimesi ja vahva: Enter your email address, your name, and a strong master password.
text.Kirjoita pääsalasanavihje vain, jos se a: Only add a master password hint if it helps you without revealing the password itself.
text.Hyväksy ehdot ja viimeistele tilin luomi: Accept the terms and complete the account creation process. Confirm your email address from the message Bitwarden sends you.
text.Valitse pitkä ja yksilöllinen pääsalasan: Choose a long and unique master password. Bitwarden does not know your master password and usually cannot recover it for you.
text.Asenna virallinen Bitwarden-sovellus tai: Install the official Bitwarden app or browser extension, or open the web vault.
text.Avaa palvelinvalinta ennen kirjautumista: Open the server selector before signing in and choose the same region you registered for:
text.Syötä sähköpostiosoitteesi ja pääsalasan: Enter your email address and master password.
text.Anna kaksivaiheisen vahvistuksen koodi t: Enter your two-factor verification code or use another verification method you have configured, if protection is enabled.
text.Kun holvi on avattu, synkronoi se tarvit: Once the vault is open, sync it if needed so that the latest data is downloaded to the device.
text.Valitse tietueen tyypiksi esimerkiksi: Choose an entry type such as
Give the entry a clear name.
text.Kirjautumistietueessa täytä käyttäjätunn: For a login entry, fill in the username, password, and website address (URI). You can generate a strong password with Bitwarden’s password generator.
text.Lisää halutessasi kansio, suosikkimerkin: If you want, add a folder, a favorite flag, custom fields, attachments, or a TOTP key.
text.. Tietue siirtyy roskakoriin, josta sen: . The entry moves to the trash, where it can be restored or deleted permanently.
text.Synkronoi holvi muutosten jälkeen, jos n: Sync the vault after changes if they do not appear immediately on another device.
text.Avaa verkkoholvi ja siirry kohtaan: Open the web vault and go to
text.Valitse ohjelma tai tiedostomuoto, josta: Choose the program or file format to import from.
text.Valitse vietävä tiedosto ja käynnistä tu: Select the file to import and start the import.
text.Tarkista tuonnin jälkeen, ettei holviin: After the import, check that no unnecessary duplicates were created in the vault.
text.Avaa verkkoholvin vientitoiminto ja vali: Open the web vault export tool and choose the vault to export.
text., kun varmuuskopio on tarkoitus palautta: if the backup is intended to be restored into Bitwarden later.
text.Vahvista vienti pääsalasanalla tai sähkö: Confirm the export with your master password or a one-time code sent to your email.
text.Säilytä vientitiedosto turvallisessa pai: Store the export file in a safe place and delete any unnecessary unencrypted copies.
text.CSV ja salaamaton JSON sisältävät holvin: CSV and unencrypted JSON contain the vault data in readable form. Do not leave them in your Downloads folder, a cloud service, or an unprotected USB drive.
text.Asenna virallinen Bitwarden-laajennus se: Install the official Bitwarden extension from your browser’s add-on store.
text.Valitse haluatko näyttää täyttöehdotukse: Choose whether you want to show fill suggestions in form fields and autofill data when the page loads. Autofill on page load should be used with care.
text.Voit täyttää kirjautumisen avaamalla laa: You can fill a login by opening the extension and choosing the suggested entry or by using your browser’s Bitwarden keyboard shortcut.
text.Jos väärä tietue näkyy sivulla, tarkista: If the wrong entry appears on a page, check the URI saved in the entry and its matching method.
text.Ota automaattitäyttöpalvelu käyttöön ja: Enable the autofill service and accept the permissions requested by your device.
text.Androidissa voit ottaa käyttöön myös lis: On Android, you can also enable additional methods if standard autofill does not work in all apps.
text.iPhonessa valitse laitteen salasana-aset: On iPhone, choose Bitwarden as the autofill provider in the device’s password settings.
text.Käytä pitkää ja yksilöllistä pääsalasana: Use a long and unique master password that you do not use anywhere else.
text.. Säilytä palautuskoodi erillään holvist: . Keep the recovery code separate from the vault.
text.Ota sovelluksessa käyttöön biometrinen a: Enable biometric unlock or a PIN in the app only on your own secure device.
text.Aseta holvi lukittumaan automaattisesti: Set the vault to lock automatically after a short period of inactivity. Signing out removes the local session completely, while locking leaves the encrypted vault on the device.
text.Pidä Bitwarden, selain ja käyttöjärjeste: Keep Bitwarden, your browser, and your operating system up to date.
text.Tarkista aika ajoin aktiiviset istunnot: Review active sessions from time to time and remove unknown devices.
text.Älä hyväksy odottamattomia kirjautumispy: Do not approve unexpected sign-in requests or give your master password to anyone.
text.Kun lisäät kirjautumistietueeseen kaksiv: When you add a TOTP key for two-factor verification to a login entry, the one-time codes it generates can also be shown in a separate
text.Asenna Bitwarden Authenticator puhelimee: Install Bitwarden Authenticator on your phone.
text.Ota Authenticatorin asetuksissa käyttöön: In the Authenticator settings, enable syncing with the Bitwarden vault and sign in to the same server region as in Password Manager.
text.Holviin tallennetut TOTP-koodit näkyvät: The TOTP codes stored in the vault appear in Authenticator after syncing.
text.Pidä synkronointi päällä, jotta holviin: Keep syncing enabled so that codes added to or edited in the vault stay up to date in Authenticator.
text.Bitwarden-tilin oman kaksivaiheisen kirj: The code used for Bitwarden account sign-in itself is safest when stored separately from the same vault that requires the code to be opened. Keep the recovery code safe as well.

attributes.Suomenkielinen Bitwarden-käyttöohje: rek: Bitwarden guide: sign-up, setup for browsers and mobile, and storing passwords securely.
attributes.Suomenkielinen ohje Bitwardenin käyttöön: A guide to getting started with Bitwarden and managing your passwords.

text.salaa tiedostot omalla laitteellasi enne: encrypts files on your own device before they are stored in a cloud service. This guide uses Google Drive as an example. The vault folder you see in the cloud contains encrypted data, and its files should not be edited directly.
text.💻 Holvin luominen tietokoneella: 💻 Creating a vault on a computer
text.📱 Holvin luominen puhelimella: 📱 Creating a vault on a phone
text.🔓 Olemassa olevan holvin lisääminen ja a: 🔓 Adding and opening an existing vault
text.🗑️ Poistaminen ja siirtäminen ulos holvi: 🗑️ Removing files and moving them out of the vault
text.ja varmista, että Google Drive näkyy Res: and make sure Google Drive appears in File Explorer or Finder.
text.Valitse holvin tallennuspaikaksi Google: Choose a Google Drive synced folder as the storage location for the vault.
text.Luo vahva ja yksilöllinen holvin salasan: Create a strong and unique password for the vault.
text.Tallenna palautusavain turvalliseen paik: Store the recovery key in a safe place separate from the vault.
text.Viimeistele luonti. Google Drive alkaa s: Finish the setup. Google Drive will automatically start syncing the encrypted vault folder.
text.Cryptomator ei pysty palauttamaan unohtu: Cryptomator cannot recover a forgotten password without the recovery key.
text.Asenna omasta sovelluskaupasta Cryptomat: Install Cryptomator on your phone from your app store and open the app.
text.Lisää Google Drive pilvipalveluksi ja ki: Add Google Drive as a cloud service and sign in to your Google account. Accept the permissions requested by the app.
text.Paina pluspainiketta ja valitse: Tap the plus button and choose
text.Valitse tallennuspaikaksi Google Drive j: Choose Google Drive and the folder you want as the storage location.
text.Anna holville nimi ja luo vahva salasana: Give the vault a name and create a strong password.
text.Tallenna palautusavain turvalliseen paik: Store the recovery key in a safe place.
text.Valikoiden nimet voivat poiketa hieman A: Menu names may differ slightly between Android and iPhone. On iPhone, Cryptomator also works through the Files app.
text.Odota, että Google Drive on synkronoinut: Wait until Google Drive has synced the vault folder to your computer.
text.Valitse Google Drivessa oleva holvikansi: Choose the vault folder in Google Drive and its
text.Valitse holvi listasta, paina: Select the vault from the list, press
text.Avaa ilmestyvä virtuaaliasema tai kansio: Open the virtual drive or folder that appears. Use files only through this unlocked view.
text.Lisää Google Drive Cryptomatorin pilvipa: Add Google Drive to Cryptomator’s cloud services.
text.Etsi holvikansio Google Drivesta ja vali: Find the vault folder in Google Drive and select it.
text.Napauta holvia ja avaa se salasanalla, b: Tap the vault and open it with the password, biometric authentication, or the device key if you have enabled one.
text.Avaa Cryptomatorin näyttämä virtuaaliase: Open the virtual drive or vault folder shown by Cryptomator.
text.Vedä tai kopioi tiedostoja avatun holvin: Drag or copy files into the unlocked vault just like you would with a normal folder.
text.Avaa ja muokkaa tiedostoja tavallisilla: Open and edit files with your usual applications. Save changes normally.
text.Cryptomator salaa muutokset, ja Google D: Cryptomator encrypts the changes, and Google Drive syncs the encrypted files to the cloud.
text.Luo kansio, tuo tiedosto laitteelta tai: Create a folder, import a file from the device, or use the share sheet to add a file to the vault.
text.Avaa tiedosto Cryptomatorista yhteensopi: Open the file from Cryptomator in a compatible application.
text.Tallenna muokattu tiedosto takaisin holv: Save the edited file back into the vault. Not all apps can save directly back to the same file, so the edited version may need to be imported back separately.
text.Avaa holvi ja poista tiedosto tai kansio: Open the vault and remove the file or folder from the unlocked virtual drive or the Cryptomator app. Do not delete individual encrypted files directly from the Google Drive vault folder.
text.Siirrä tai kopioi tiedosto avatusta holv: Move or copy the file from the unlocked vault to a normal folder. If you copy the file, remove the original from the vault separately if you do not want to keep it there.
text.Valitse tiedosto ja käytä: Select the file and use the
text.-toimintoa. Poista alkuperäinen holvista: action. Remove the original from the vault separately if needed.
text.Holvista ulos siirretty tai viety tiedos: A file moved or exported out of the vault is no longer protected by Cryptomator.
text.Tallenna ja sulje kaikki holvissa avoinn: Save and close all files that are open from the vault.
text.Odota hetki, jotta ohjelmat ehtivät kirj: Wait a moment so your applications have time to write changes to disk.
text.Odota, että Google Drive on synkronoinut: Wait until Google Drive has synced the changes before shutting down the computer.
text.Palaa Cryptomatoriin ja sulje avoin holv: Return to Cryptomator and close the open vault with the lock button.
text.Voit ottaa asetuksista käyttöön automaat: You can enable automatic locking in the settings so the vault closes when you leave the app or after a set amount of time.
text.Säilytä holvin salasana ja palautusavain: Keep the vault password and recovery key safe. Neither the cloud service nor Cryptomator support can open the vault for you.
text.Älä nimeä uudelleen, siirrä tai muokkaa: Do not rename, move, or edit the encrypted files inside the vault directly in Google Drive.
text.Varmuuskopioi holvi. Pilvisynkronointi e: Back up the vault. Cloud syncing alone is not a backup.
text.Varmista ennen holvin lukitsemista, että: Before locking the vault, make sure the files are no longer open in other applications.

attributes.Suomenkielinen ohje tiedostojen salaamis: A guide to encrypting files with Cryptomator before storing them in the cloud.

attributes.Täältä löydät Markuksen kohdennetut työh: Here you'll find Markus's targeted job application templates for different industries.

text.Kielten opiskelu satunnaisesti: Studying languages from time to time
text.Kavereiden ja tyttöystävän kanssa ajan v: Spending time with friends and my girlfriend
text.Olen luotettava ja oma-aloitteinen tekij: I am a reliable and proactive contributor with versatile experience in both practical logistics and technical problem solving. As an early-morning delivery worker, I have learned to value precision and optimize processes, and I have excellent visual-spatial memory. In my free time I design, code, and maintain extensive web infrastructures and servers. I am looking for work where I can use my ability to understand large systems and quickly learn new ones — whether it is source code or complex route maps.
text.Puhtaus- ja kiinteistöpalvelualan perust: Vocational qualification in cleaning and property services
text.Opiskelin kotityöpalvelujen osaamisalan,: I studied the home services specialization, which focused mainly on household care.
text.Työhön ja itsenäiseen elämään valmentava: Preparatory education for work and independent living
The program focused on independent living skills.
text.Varsinais-Suomen Tietojakelu Oy, Salo |: Varsinais-Suomen Tietojakelu Oy, Salo | Jun 2023 - Present
text.Jaan aamuyöllä lehtiä, kirjeitä ja josku: I deliver newspapers, letters, and occasionally parcels in the early hours of the morning.
text.Tuotantolinjalla tein erilaisia tehtäviä: On the production line I handled different tasks involved in building electric vehicle batteries.
text.Ihme ja Kumma Tuki Ry, Salo | touko 2021: Ihme ja Kumma Tuki Ry, Salo | May 2021 - Oct 2021
text.Olin heillä kirpputorimyyjänä jokusen ku: I worked there as a flea market sales assistant for a few months until I got a job at Valmet. Later, Ihme ja Kumma unfortunately went bankrupt.

text.Avoin työhakemus – Itseohjautuva verkkot: Open application – A self-directed specialist in web technologies and infrastructure
text.Lähetän teille tämän avoimen hakemuksen,: I am sending you this open application because I am looking for new challenges in the field and I am highly interested in your company's work. I am a goal-oriented professional with strong logical problem-solving skills, and modern web technologies and infrastructure maintenance are not only core parts of my expertise but also a genuine passion.
text.Olen suunnitellut ja rakentanut täysin i: I have independently designed and built a comprehensive web infrastructure around my own domains. I am comfortable with both frontend and backend development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP) and understand deeply how systems communicate with each other. In addition to development work, I handle the setup and maintenance of my own server environment (for example VPS solutions and cloud storage) as well as version control through GitHub. Security, privacy, and process automation are built-in ways of working for me, not just add-on features.
text.Mitä tuon mukanani tiimiin:: What I bring to a team:
text.Kyky rakentaa ja ylläpitää verkkopalvelu: The ability to build and maintain web services all the way from the server layer to the user interface.
text.Nautin monimutkaisten ongelmien purkamis: I enjoy breaking down complex problems and optimizing code.
text.Ymmärrän miten asiat koodataan, ja miten: I understand how things are coded and how they are kept securely running.
text.Varhaisjakelijan taustani on opettanut m: My background as an early-morning delivery worker has taught me precision and the ability to get things done on schedule — qualities that are also highly valuable in demanding IT projects.
text.Keskustelisin erittäin mielelläni lisää: I would be very happy to discuss further how my technical expertise could meet your company's needs.
text.• HTML5 & CSS3\n• JavaScript & PHP\n• Li:
• HTML5 & CSS3
• JavaScript & PHP
• Linux VPS / Cloud Infra
• Git / GitHub / CI/CD
• Security & Automation

text.Avoin työhakemus – Täsmällinen ja reitti: Open application – A precise professional with strong route management skills
text.Lähetän teille tämän avoimen hakemuksen,: I am sending you this open application because I am looking for new challenges in distribution and logistics, and I believe my experience would fit your needs very well. I am used to independent, responsible, and precision-focused work.
text.Työskentelen tällä hetkellä varhaisjakaj: I currently work as an early-morning delivery worker, which has taught me resilience under pressure and seamless routine management. One of my strengths is exceptionally strong visual and numerical memory; I learn and remember new routes, customer details, and delivery box locations very quickly without constant repetition. I can optimize driving routes independently and make sure deliveries arrive precisely on schedule, even in demanding weather conditions and during night shifts.
text.Hoidan annetut tehtävät alusta loppuun i: I handle assigned tasks from start to finish without constant supervision.
text.Hahmottamalla laajoja kokonaisuuksia ota: By understanding larger systems quickly, I can master new areas and routes in no time.
text.En pelkää fyysistä työtä tai epätyypilli: I am not afraid of physical work or unconventional working hours.
text.Olen valmis tarttumaan uusiin haasteisii: I am ready to take on new challenges and bring a strong work ethic with me. I would gladly come to an interview to tell you more about how I could benefit your organization.
text.• Jakelu ja logistiikka\n• Reittien opti:
• Distribution and logistics
• Route optimization
• Excellent route memory
• Independent work style

text.Sorolan Holvi (\"the Extension\") is a p: Sorola Vault ("the Extension") is a personal, encrypted password manager committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how the Extension handles your data.
